legal_boundary: This repository records the user's rights representation and licensing instruction; it is not an independent legal opinion and cannot waive rights the declarant does not own.
supersession_rule: A later correction must create a new immutable declaration and suspend affected releases; this declaration is not silently rewritten.

user_representation.exact_statement_basis: User selected A2 after being told A2 means the S00-S19 materials are user-authored/project-authored or independently summarized from public-domain classical sources, contain no unlicensed substantial copying from modern third-party sources, and are to be dedicated under CC0.
